action.reasoning: Observation: 18-model ensemble (12 same + 6 diverse) gave IC=0.04775, slightly worse than 12-seed best of 0.04789. Diverse params didn't help. Analysis: Best is 12-seed same config. With 8 iters and 3.17h left, I should restore the 12-seed config that achieved 0.04789 to ensure best checkpoint is in place. Then maybe try one more variation. Decision: Retrain 12 seeds same config (the proven best) and submit eval to lock in.
